'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 119''' is the one hundred nineteenth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[April 7]], [[2004]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*Secret Union - The marriage of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]]
*The [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]
*Anakin Skywalker
*[[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]
*[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]
*[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]]
*[[Shmi Skywalker Lars/Legends|Shmi Skywalker]]
*[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] - Architecture
*[[Q9-X2]]
*[[Lightsaber/Legends|Lightsabers]]
